input.title: Microsoft 365 User Utilization
input.message: To view the report, use the hosted report URL for your imported webhook trigger. Replace this placeholder after import.
input.subject: Microsoft 365 User Utilization Report

template.body:
{% set report = CTX.report_data | d('{}') | from_json_string %} {% set summary = report.summary | d({}) %} {% set pricing = report.pricing_summary | d({}) %} {% set workloads = report.workload_summary | d({}) %} {% set user_rows = report.user_rows | d([]) %} {% set license_rows = report.license_rows | d([]) %} {% set tenant_name = CTX.tenant_name | d(report.tenant_name | d('Tenant')) %}

{{ tenant_name }} Microsoft 365 User Utilization

A review of assigned licenses, successful sign-in evidence, Microsoft 365 workload activity, and estimated license review opportunities.

Report period: {{ report.report_period | d(CTX.report_period | d('D30')) }} Stale threshold: {{ report.stale_days | d(CTX.stale_days | d(90)) }} days {% if report.generated_at %}Generated: {{ report.generated_at }}{% endif %}
Total users{{ summary.total_users | d(0) }}
Licensed{{ summary.licensed_users | d(0) }}
Stale{{ summary.stale_users | d(0) }}
Est. stale review / mo${{ '%.2f'|format(pricing.stale_monthly_reclaim | d(0)) }}
Priced coverage{{ pricing.priced_assignment_count | d(0) }}/{{ pricing.total_assignment_count | d(0) }}

Important Notes

    {% for note in report.notes | d([]) %}
  • {{ note }}
    • {% endfor %}
  • Cost estimates use matched public Microsoft list prices only. Unmatched, bundled, ambiguous, or unpriced SKUs are excluded from savings estimates.
  • Low or missing usage evidence is a review signal, not proof that a license can be removed. Validate business role, mailbox type, shared use, and approval before making changes.

Executive Snapshot

Summary rows are intended to help prioritize review work. They should not be treated as automatic remediation instructions.

CategoryUsersEvidenceEstimated Monthly Review
Licensed and active {{ summary.active_licensed_users | d(summary.active_users | d(0)) }} Recent sign-in or Microsoft 365 workload evidence. $0.00
Licensed and stale {{ summary.stale_users | d(0) }} No successful sign-in within the configured stale threshold. ${{ '%.2f'|format(pricing.stale_monthly_reclaim | d(0)) }}
Licensed with no workload evidence {{ summary.no_workload_users | d(0) }} Licensed user with no workload usage surfaced in the report window. ${{ '%.2f'|format(pricing.no_workload_monthly_review | d(0)) }}
Licensed but low utilization {{ summary.low_utilization_users | d(0) }} Limited direct workload evidence in the current window. ${{ '%.2f'|format(pricing.low_monthly_review | d(0)) }}

User Detail

Current license assignment is shown in full. Workload columns show direct activity evidence from the selected report window.

Workload Adoption

WorkloadUsers With ActivityEvidence Source
Office 365 active{{ workloads.office | d(0) }}Microsoft 365 active user detail.
Email{{ workloads.email | d(0) }}Exchange or Outlook activity detected.
Teams{{ workloads.teams | d(0) }}Teams activity detected.
OneDrive{{ workloads.onedrive | d(0) }}OneDrive activity detected.
SharePoint{{ workloads.sharepoint | d(0) }}SharePoint activity detected.
M365 Apps{{ workloads.m365app | d(0) }}M365 Apps activity detected.

Recommendations

This queue is driven by direct evidence: stale sign-in, no workload evidence, low utilization, or unlicensed accounts that still deserve review.

template.name: Microsoft 365 User Utilization Report - Community

publish.email_addresses: {% if CTX.email_addresses is string %}{{ CTX.email_addresses.split(',') | map('trim') | reject('equalto', '') | list }}{% else %}{{ CTX.email_addresses | d(['admin@example.com']) }}{% endif %}

publish.exclusion_patterns: {% if CTX.exclusion_patterns is string %}{{ CTX.exclusion_patterns.split(',') | map('trim') | list }}{% else %}{{ CTX.exclusion_patterns | d(['svc', 'service', 'shared', 'breakglass', 'break-glass', 'backup', 'automation', 'noreply']) }}{% endif %}

publish.report_window_days: {% set period = (CTX.report_period | d('D30')) | upper %}{% if period == 'D7' %}7{% elif period == 'D90' %}90{% elif period == 'D180' %}180{% else %}30{% endif %}

nonfunctional_fields.description: Community-safe Microsoft 365 user utilization snapshot. Collects Graph usage evidence, license assignment context, and estimated review opportunities without private branding.
nonfunctional_fields.name: Microsoft 365 User Utilization Report - Community

nonfunctional_fields.varsSchema.exclusion_patterns.descriptio: UPN substrings to exclude from scoring.
nonfunctional_fields.varsSchema.exclusion_patterns.label: Excluded User Patterns
nonfunctional_fields.varsSchema.include_disabled.description: Reserved for a later iteration; current scoring emphasizes enabled accounts.
nonfunctional_fields.varsSchema.include_disabled.label: Include Disabled Users
nonfunctional_fields.varsSchema.report_period.description: Microsoft usage report period. Recommended values: D7, D30, D90, D180.
nonfunctional_fields.varsSchema.report_period.label: Report Period
nonfunctional_fields.varsSchema.stale_days.description: Days without a successful sign-in before a user is considered stale.
nonfunctional_fields.varsSchema.stale_days.label: Stale Threshold Days
nonfunctional_fields.varsSchema.tenant_name.description: Display name for the report header.
nonfunctional_fields.varsSchema.tenant_name.label: Tenant Name
